reasoning: The identity function constructs CompressedEdwardsY([1, 0, ...0]). The proof block needs to show field_element_from_bytes(&result.0) == 1 (the byte array encodes the value 1 in little-endian), result.0[31] >> 7 == 0 (sign bit is 0), and the array literal properties.
